title: News - Dr. Jeevun Sandher MP

h2: Working with Charnwood Borough Council
h2: Visiting the Loughborough Area Foodbank
h2: Meeting Our Local Police Force
text_excerpt: News - Dr. Jeevun Sandher MP Home News How I can help Newsletter Tours of Parliament Visits and Diary News Barrow Crime and Antisocial Behaviour Forum On Saturday, I held a public meeting for Barrow upon Soar residents to discuss their concerns about local crime and antisocial behaviour (ASB). I brought together the police and Charnwood Borough Council to join me… Read more Working with Charnwood Borough Council I held a really informative meeting with Rob Mitchell (CEO) and Jewel Miah (Leader) at Charnwood Borough Council. Many of the issues raised by local residents with me are to do with Charnwood so it… Read more Loughborough College It was good to have a really productive meeting with Loughborough College this week, disusing how we get the skills our local young people need and what local business needs to succeed. Read more Visiting the Loughborough Area Foodbank This morning, I visited the Loughborough Area Foodbank and saw up-close the incredible work they do for the most vulnerable members of our community. The food bank is a testament to the staff’s dedication and… Read more Meeting Our Local Police Force It was truly encouraging to meet with Chief Inspector Michelle and her dedicated team to discuss strategies for reducing crime and anti-social behaviour in our community. I hear consistently from constituents that addressing crime and… Read more 1 2 Next Page » Subscribe to my regular newsletter Dr. Jeevun Sandher MP for Loughborough, Shepshed and the Villages Site content Home News How I can help Newsletter Tours of Parliament Visits and Diary Policies Privacy Policy Acceptable behaviour
